lines.gurmukhi: ਰੂੜੀ ਬਾਣੀ ਜੇ ਰਪੈ ਨਾ ਇਹੁ ਰੰਗੁ ਲਹੈ ਨ ਜਾਇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: roorree baanee je rapai naa ihu rang lahai na jaae |1| rahaau |
lines.english: If you imbue yourself with the Beauteous Word of the Guru's Bani, then this color shall never fade away. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਏ ਮਨ ਰੂੜੑੇ ਰੰਗੁਲੇ ਤੂੰ ਸਚਾ ਰੰਗੁ ਚੜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: e man roorrae rangule toon sachaa rang charraae |
lines.english: O beauteous and joyful mind, imbue yourself with your true color.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਮ ਨੀਚ ਮੈਲੇ ਅਤਿ ਅਭਿਮਾਨੀ ਦੂਜੈ ਭਾਇ ਵਿਕਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: ham neech maile at abhimaanee doojai bhaae vikaar |
lines.english: I am lowly, filthy, and totally egotistical; I am attached to the corruption of duality.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਿ ਪਾਰਸਿ ਮਿਲਿਐ ਕੰਚਨੁ ਹੋਏ ਨਿਰਮਲ ਜੋਤਿ ਅਪਾਰ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: gur paaras miliai kanchan hoe niramal jot apaar |2|
lines.english: But meeting with the Guru, the Philosopher's Stone, I am transformed into gold; I am blended with the Pure Light of the Infinite Lord. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਗੁਰ ਕੋਇ ਨ ਰੰਗੀਐ ਗੁਰਿ ਮਿਲਿਐ ਰੰਗੁ ਚੜਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: bin gur koe na rangeeai gur miliai rang charraau |
lines.english: Without the Guru, no one is imbued with the color of the Lord's Love; meeting with the Guru, this color is applied.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਭੈ ਭਾਇ ਜੋ ਰਤੇ ਸਿਫਤੀ ਸਚਿ ਸਮਾਉ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: gur kai bhai bhaae jo rate sifatee sach samaau |3|
lines.english: Those who are imbued with the Fear, and the Love of the Guru, are absorbed in the Praise of the True Lord. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਭੈ ਕਰਮ ਕਮਾਵਣੇ ਝੂਠੇ ਠਾਉ ਨ ਕੋਇ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: bin bhai karam kamaavane jhootthe tthaau na koe |4|
lines.english: Without fear, the performance of rituals is false, and one finds no place of rest. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਭੈ ਬਿਨੁ ਲਾਗਿ ਨ ਲਗਈ ਨਾ ਮਨੁ ਨਿਰਮਲੁ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: bhai bin laag na lagee naa man niramal hoe |
lines.english: Without fear, the cloth is not dyed, and the mind is not rendered pure.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੂਰੇ ਗੁਰ ਤੇ ਸਤਸੰਗਤਿ ਊਪਜੈ ਸਹਜੇ ਸਚਿ ਸੁਭਾਇ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: poore gur te satasangat aoopajai sahaje sach subhaae |5|
lines.english: From the Perfect Guru, the Sat Sangat emanates, and one easily merges into the Love of the True One. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸ ਨੋ ਆਪੇ ਰੰਗੇ ਸੁ ਰਪਸੀ ਸਤਸੰਗਤਿ ਮਿਲਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: jis no aape range su rapasee satasangat milaae |
lines.english: Only those whom the Lord imbues, are so imbued; they join the Sat Sangat, the True Congregation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਸੰਗਤੀ ਸਭਿ ਐਸੇ ਰਹਹਿ ਜੈਸੇ ਪਸੁ ਢੋਰ ॥
lines.translit: bin sangatee sabh aise raheh jaise pas dtor |
lines.english: Without the Sangat, the Company of the Holy, all remain like beasts and animals.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨੑਿ ਕੀਤੇ ਤਿਸੈ ਨ ਜਾਣਨੑੀ ਬਿਨੁ ਨਾਵੈ ਸਭਿ ਚੋਰ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: jina keete tisai na jaananaee bin naavai sabh chor |6|
lines.english: They do not know the One who created them; without the Name, all are thieves. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਕਿ ਗੁਣ ਵਿਹਾਝਹਿ ਅਉਗਣ ਵਿਕਣਹਿ ਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਸਹਜਿ ਸੁਭਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: eik gun vihaajheh aaugan vikaneh gur kai sehaj subhaae |
lines.english: Some purchase merits and sell off their demerits; through the Guru, they obtain peace and poise.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਸੇਵਾ ਤੇ ਨਾਉ ਪਾਇਆ ਵੁਠਾ ਅੰਦਰਿ ਆਇ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: gur sevaa te naau paaeaa vutthaa andar aae |7|
lines.english: Serving the Guru, they obtain the Name, which comes to dwell deep within. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮੇ ਲਾਇ ਸਵਾਰਿਅਨੁ ਸਬਦੇ ਲਏ ਮਿਲਾਇ ॥੮॥੯॥੩੧॥
lines.translit: naanak naame laae savaarian sabade le milaae |8|9|31|
lines.english: O Nanak, the Lord embellishes us with the Name; attached to the Word of the Shabad, we are merged into Him. ||8||9||31||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭਨਾ ਕਾ ਦਾਤਾ ਏਕੁ ਹੈ ਸਿਰਿ ਧੰਧੈ ਲਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: sabhanaa kaa daataa ek hai sir dhandhai laae |
lines.english: The One Lord is the Giver of all; He assigns tasks to each and every person.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭ ਨਾਵੈ ਨੋ ਲੋਚਦੀ ਜਿਸੁ ਕ੍ਰਿਪਾ ਕਰੇ ਸੋ ਪਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: sabh naavai no lochadee jis kripaa kare so paae |
lines.english: Everyone longs for the Name, but he alone receives it, unto whom the Lord shows His Mercy.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਸਾ ਮਹਲਾ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: aasaa mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Aasaa, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਨਾਵੈ ਸਭੁ ਦੁਖੁ ਹੈ ਸੁਖੁ ਤਿਸੁ ਜਿਸੁ ਮੰਨਿ ਵਸਾਏ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: bin naavai sabh dukh hai sukh tis jis man vasaae |1|
lines.english: Without the Name, there is only pain; he alone obtains peace, whose mind is filled with the Name. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੂੰ ਬੇਅੰਤੁ ਦਇਆਲੁ ਹੈ ਤੇਰੀ ਸਰਣਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: toon beant deaal hai teree saranaaee |
lines.english: You are infinite and merciful; I seek Your Sanctuary.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਤਰਿ ਬਾਹਰਿ ਏਕੁ ਹੈ ਬਹੁ ਬਿਧਿ ਸ੍ਰਿਸਟਿ ਉਪਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: antar baahar ek hai bahu bidh srisatt upaaee |
lines.english: Inwardly and outwardly, there is only the One Lord. He has created the world, with its many varieties.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਪੂਰੇ ਤੇ ਪਾਈਐ ਨਾਮੇ ਵਡਿਆਈ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: gur poore te paaeeai naame vaddiaaee |1| rahaau |
lines.english: From the Perfect Guru, the glorious greatness of the Naam is obtained. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬੁਝਣਾ ਅਬੁਝਣਾ ਤੁਧੁ ਕੀਆ ਇਹ ਤੇਰੀ ਸਿਰਿ ਕਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: bujhanaa abujhanaa tudh keea ih teree sir kaar |
lines.english: Knowledge and ignorance are all your making; You have control over these.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੁਕਮੇ ਕਾਰ ਕਰਾਇਦਾ ਦੂਜਾ ਕਿਸੁ ਕਹੀਐ ਭਾਈ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: hukame kaar karaaeidaa doojaa kis kaheeai bhaaee |2|
lines.english: According to the Order of His Will, He makes us act. What else can we talk about, O Siblings of Destiny? ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਕਿ ਧੁਰਿ ਪਵਿਤ ਪਾਵਨ ਹਹਿ ਤੁਧੁ ਨਾਮੇ ਲਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: eik dhur pavit paavan heh tudh naame laae |
lines.english: Some, from the very beginning, are pure and pious; You attach them to Your Name.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਕਨੑਾ ਬਖਸਿਹਿ ਮੇਲਿ ਲੈਹਿ ਇਕਿ ਦਰਗਹ ਮਾਰਿ ਕਢੇ ਕੂੜਿਆਰ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: eikanaa bakhasihi mel laihi ik daragah maar kadte koorriaar |3|
lines.english: Some, You forgive, and unite with Yourself; while others, the wicked, you strike down and drive out of Your Court. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਕਿ ਕੁਚਲ ਕੁਚੀਲ ਵਿਖਲੀ ਪਤੇ ਨਾਵਹੁ ਆਪਿ ਖੁਆਏ ॥
lines.translit: eik kuchal kucheel vikhalee pate naavahu aap khuaae |
lines.english: Some are crooked, filthy and vicious; the Lord Himself has led them astray from the Name.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਸੇਵਾ ਤੇ ਸੁਖੁ ਊਪਜੈ ਸਚੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਬੁਝਾਏ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: gur sevaa te sukh aoopajai sachai sabad bujhaae |4|
lines.english: Serving the Guru, peace wells up; through the True Word of the Shabad, one comes to understand. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਦਰਿ ਕਰੇ ਜਿਸੁ ਆਪਣੀ ਤਿਸ ਨੋ ਭਾਵਨੀ ਲਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: nadar kare jis aapanee tis no bhaavanee laae |
lines.english: He grants faith to those whom He has blessed with His Glance of Grace.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾ ਓਨ ਸਿਧਿ ਨ ਬੁਧਿ ਹੈ ਨ ਸੰਜਮੀ ਫਿਰਹਿ ਉਤਵਤਾਏ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: naa on sidh na budh hai na sanjamee fireh utavataae |5|
lines.english: They have no intuition, no understanding and no self-discipline; they wander around delirious. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਲੇਖਾ ਪੜਿ ਨ ਪਹੂਚੀਐ ਕਥਿ ਕਹਣੈ ਅੰਤੁ ਨ ਪਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: lekhaa parr na pahoocheeai kath kahanai ant na paae |
lines.english: By reading books, one cannot reach Him; by speaking and talking, His limits cannot be found.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤੁ ਸੰਤੋਖੁ ਇਹ ਸੰਜਮੀ ਮਨੁ ਨਿਰਮਲੁ ਸਬਦੁ ਸੁਣਾਏ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: sat santokh ih sanjamee man niramal sabad sunaae |6|
lines.english: This mind finds truth, contentment and self-discipline, hearing the Immaculate Word of the Shabad. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਹੁ ਮਨੁ ਦੇਹੀ ਸੋਧਿ ਤੂੰ ਗੁਰ ਸਬਦਿ ਵੀਚਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: eihu man dehee sodh toon gur sabad veechaar |
lines.english: So reform this mind and body, by contemplating the Word of the Guru's Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਤੇ ਕੀਮਤਿ ਪਾਈਐ ਸਚਿ ਸਬਦਿ ਸੋਝੀ ਪਾਇ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: gur te keemat paaeeai sach sabad sojhee paae |7|
lines.english: Through the Guru, His value is found; through the True Word of the Shabad, understanding is obtained. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਇਸੁ ਦੇਹੀ ਵਿਚਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਨਿਧਾਨੁ ਹੈ ਪਾਈਐ ਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਹੇਤਿ ਅਪਾਰਿ ॥੮॥੧੦॥੩੨॥
lines.translit: naanak is dehee vich naam nidhaan hai paaeeai gur kai het apaar |8|10|32|
lines.english: O Nanak, within this body is the treasure of the Naam, the Name of the Lord; it is found through the Love of the Infinite Guru. ||8||10||32||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚਿ ਰਤੀਆ ਸੋਹਾਗਣੀ ਜਿਨਾ ਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਸੀਗਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: sach rateea sohaaganee jinaa gur kai sabad seegaar |
lines.english: The happy soul-brides are imbued with Truth; they are adorned with the Word of the Guru's Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਸਾ ਮਹਲਾ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: aasaa mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Aasaa, Third Mehl:
